patches.reason: External codex-hxrust scaffold check profiles generated haxe_call_stack_call_stack_impl_.rs with an unresolved root Exception type when CallStack.exceptionToString used Exception directly.
patches.change: Replaced the local Dynamic workaround with a generic haxe.rust fix: dev haxelib checkouts now mirror std top-level entries under src/ so haxe.rust's haxe.Exception override is visible on the initial classpath, and CallStack.exceptionToString keeps the typed haxe.Exception contract.
patches.followUp: No active local patch remains for this issue; keep this historical record until the next patch-ledger cleanup.
